full_text:
DAY 0: 16.3.2021

Comments on the tissue: Small piece of omentum with a solid nodule and cyst-looking nodule. Firm and hard looking nodule (approx. 2.5 cm x 2.5 cm) with only minimal residual tissue was minced into smaller pieces using sterile scalpel and scissors, and digested with Dispase.

Sample preparation:

Total yield of cells: 11.45 x 106 cells per ml (total 1 mL).

DAY 1:

No treatment.

DAY 6:

Medium was changed for 24-well plate cultures of prepared for DNA / RNA isolation

Comments: After 3 days of culture (Friday) cells had not overgrown and seemed very viable in the cultures so it was decided that they will be harvested on Day 6 (Monday).

SUMMARY:

Analysis | Status
Flow – day 0 | No
Flow – after drug treatment | No
IF (Shandon slides) | No
FFPE (control) | Embedded as paraffin block
DNA / RNA isolation | ??
